items.text: 最后我想说的是，这是你会反复做的一件事，那就是 Now one last thing I want to touch on because it's a thing that you'll do over and over again is 让角色在序列器中运行，如果你在上一章结尾看到了这一点 Having characters run inside of sequencer now if you saw at the end of that last chapter 我们有一个向前慢跑的动画，但这个动画只让角色在原地移动 We have this jog forward animation, but this has our character only moving in place 那么，怎样才能把这样一部动画片变成她环游世界的正式演出呢？ So how can we take an animation like this and turn it into a proper run where she's traveling through the world? 现在看来，这似乎有悖于直觉 Now it might seem counterintuitive 但如果有运行动画，最理想的情况是让角色在原地运行 But if you have a run animation the ideal situation is having your character run in place 然后，我们可以通过在序列器中设置一些关键帧，为她在世界中移动的位置制作动画 And then we can animate where she's moving in the world by setting some keyframes inside of sequencer 现在我们有了这个动画 So now that we have this animation 打开变换轨道，跳转到第一帧，在这里创建一个关键帧 Let's open up our transform track and we'll jump to our first frame and let's create a keyframe here now 让我们将鼠标悬停在这些关键帧上，然后按下 4 键 Let's hover over these keyframes and press the 4 key now 如果我们右键点击这里的关键帧，会有什么效果？我们有不同的关键帧插值 What did this do if we right-click our keyframes here? We have different keyframe interpolations 这只是应用于关键帧的平滑效果 This is just the smoothing that's applied to our keyframes 实际上，让我们暂时将其设置为立方体，因为它可以帮助我们看到一个问题，当我们使用 Let's actually set this back to cubic for now because it'll help us see a problem that will pop up when we use 用于运行动画的立体关键帧。因此，我们要做的是让角色穿越整个世界 Cubic keyframes for run animations. So what we want to do is we want to try to make our character travel throughout the world 与她双脚在地面上移动的速度相同 At the same speed as her feet are moving on the ground 因此，我们要在我们的场景中向前推进回声 So we want to move echo forward in our scene 所以，如果我们只是想用猎枪打一枪，看看会有什么结果 So if we were just gonna shotgun this and see what results we get 让我们把它向前拖动一定的距离，看看它有多接近正确值 Let's just drag this forward a set amount and see how close this is to looking correct 因此，我们可以看到她仍在慢动作中奔跑 So we can see here that she's still kind of running in slow motion 她看起来应该比现在走得更远 She it looks like she should be traveling further than she is 所以我认为，考虑到我们在这个场景中的空间大小 So I think given the amount of space we have in this scene 实际上，我要把第一个关键帧向后移动一点，看看效果如何，这样就更接近了。 I'm actually gonna move this first keyframe back a little bit further and see how that looks and this is a lot closer just by 在这里瞟了一眼，但她还是停在了最后 Eyeballing this here, but she still stops at the end 因此，我们可以做的一件事就是选择最后一个关键帧，然后 so one thing we can do to prevent her from stopping at the end is we can select this last keyframe and 打开曲线编辑器。点击那个小图标，就可以看到我们的立体关键帧了。 Open up our curve editor. So let's click that little icon there and here we can start to see our cubic keyframes 因此，我们在 X 处设置了这个变换关键帧，为了将这个关键帧继续延伸到远处 So we have this transform keyframe in X and in order to just continue this on into the distance 我们可以更改我们的职位 We could change our post 无穷大 "设置这个小图标，并将其设置为线性，这样就能使我们的动画 Infinity settings this little icon here and set this to linear and this will make it so that our animation 在我们结束后继续向远方延伸 Continues on into the distance after we've ended 但是，如果她在跑步，我们就不希望缓进缓出，我们希望它一直都是完全笔直的。 But if she's running we wouldn't want to ease in and ease out we want it to be perfectly straight the whole time 我们可以在这里选择关键帧，甚至在曲线编辑器中也是如此 That's where we can select our keyframes here and even in the curve editor 我可以按下 4 键，将其转化为线性关键帧 I can press the 4 key and turn these into linear keyframes 所以我们知道她一直在以相同的速度移动 So we know she's moving at the same speed the entire time 现在，如果我们回到这里，就能看到我们离那只脚落地有多近了 And now if we go back over here, we can see how close we are to having that foot being planted on the ground 我们可以看出，它还是有一点滑动。那么，有什么好办法来调整它呢？ We can tell that it still slides a little bit. So what's the best way to dial that in? 这实际上是通过点按关键帧来实现的。因此，这里有一个非常有用的热键 It's actually by nudging our keyframes. So there's a really useful hotkey here 即按住 ctrl 键，然后按左右箭头 Which is ctrl and then the left and right arrows 这样，关键帧就会在时间轴上左右移动一帧 So this is going to move our keyframe left and right in our timeline by one frame 那么，这对我们更快或更慢地移动角色有什么帮助呢？ So, how does this help us move our character faster or slower? 那么，如果我们将这个关键帧向左移动，就会使她的行程更长 Well, if we move this keyframe to the left, it will make her travel more 在更少的帧数内达到更远的距离，这意味着她会跑得更快，或者如果我们将其向右移动 Distance in a fewer amount of frames meaning she'll go faster or if we move it to the right 她在两个关键帧之间移动的时间会更长，移动速度也会更慢。 It'll take longer for her to travel between the two keyframes making her move slower 因此，根据我们双脚的滑动程度，我们可以这样移动 So depending on how much our feet are sliding we can move this 我们可以把它移近以加快速度，也可以把它移远以减慢速度 Closer to be faster or we can move it further away to be slower 所以现在她移动得太慢了。所以我们需要把它移近一点 So right now she's moving too slow. So we need to move it in closer 让我们近距离观察这只前脚，看看它是如何着地的，我们可以看到它真的很棒 Let's get really close to this front foot and see how it looks as it's planted and we can see it's really good 它还在一点点滑动。因此，如果它在这里栽种，我们希望它在最后更靠近一点 It still slides just a little bit. So if it plants here, we'd want it to be even closer at the end 因此，让我们将关键帧向左移动一帧，现在你可以看到我们的双脚稳稳地站在地面上了 So let's move that keyframe to the left by one frame and now you can see our feet are pretty rock-solid on the ground here 但现在她马上就跑出了场景。因此，我们可以做一件事，把她推回场景中去 But now she just runs out of the scene right away. So one thing we can do to push her back in the scene 我们可以做两件事。一是我们可以回到曲线编辑器中，设置我们的 There's two different things we could do. The one thing is we can go back into our curve editor and set our 无穷大之前也是线性的 Pre-infinity to linear as well 现在，我们可以看到它向远处延伸，我们可以移动这些关键帧了 And now we can see that this extends off into the distance and now we could actually move these keyframes 前进，让她在空间中后退 Forward and have her move back in space 就像这样，现在她就会在我们的整个场景中移动，或者用另一种方法，你可能已经看到了我们之前的控制装备 Like this and now she moves throughout our entire scene or the other method which you might have seen earlier with our control rig 我们可以创建一个加法变换轨道 Is we can create an additive transform track 现在，该轨道与当前时间指示器在同一帧中创建 Now this track is created from the same frame as your current time indicator 因此，在这里我们实际上需要将其扩展，以便覆盖整个画幅范围 So here we actually need to extend this out so it covers our full frame range 但是，利用这个添加轨迹，我们可以在字符的位置上进行添加 But using this additive track we can add on to the position of our character 因此，我们可以像这样将她的位置偏移到画面的后方 So we could offset her further back in the frame just like this 因此，我们制作了一个角色不动的动画，并添加了一个变换轨迹 So to recap we took an animation where the character is not moving and we added a transform track 我们创建了线性关键帧，热键是 4，可以将关键帧从立方体改为线性，并将关键帧从立方体改为线性。 we created linear keyframes which the hotkey is 4 to change your keyframes from cubic to linear and 然后，我们使用 ctrl 左键和 ctrl 右键对关键帧进行推移，使其更近或更远 Then we use ctrl left and ctrl right to our keyframes to nudge them closer or further away 让 Echo 移动得更慢或更快，直到我们目测确认她的脚没有滑动为止 To make Echo move slower or faster until we have visual confirmation that her feet are not sliding 当我们近距离观察时，现在我们已经有了一个非常漂亮的简单运行动画，Echo 在我们的洞穴中移动 When we're looking up close and now we've got a really nice simple running animation with Echo as she moves through our cave
items.speaker: instructor
